description: Machine-readable AI knowledge base index for the wasd project.

Combat autoload contract for single-entry damage application and DamageInfo payloads

Gameplay runtime contract for finite map setup, player movement, weapon firing, skill casting, status effects, pooled bullets, pooled enemies, pooled hazards, spawning, HUD, save/restore, title flow, and restart
update_triggers: Player, weapon, skill, map, or hazard runtime changes
runtime module split or scene-resource migration

documents.authority: SkillSystem runtime contract for project-light GAS active skill definitions, ability tags, activation tag gating, resource costs, targeting primitives, effect primitives, status effect application, cooldowns, Combat integration, and run snapshots

StatusEffect Resource and StatusEffectComponent runtime contract for status stacking, ability tag grant/release lifecycle, burn DoT Combat ticking, GameClock ticking, Player/Enemy entity status hosts, and SkillSystem/entity status snapshots

EnemyAI runtime contract for data-driven ecological profiles, Utility action scoring, FSM charge execution, steering movement, monster-vs-monster contact damage, Enemy status host behavior, and run snapshot fields
MapManager runtime contract for finite map bounds, PCG hazard placement, manual placement overrides, spawn clamping, and map snapshots
HazardSystem runtime contract for pooled hazards, radius triggers, Combat damage, FEA-12 test hazard, and hazard snapshots
DebugConsole and GMCommandRegistry contract for debug/dev_tools-only commands and release guard boundaries
DataLoader autoload contract for JSON/CSV loading, generated contracts cache, and fail-fast data diagnostics
ModLoader autoload contract for local mod manifests, data patches, runtime contract extensions, and Workshop distribution boundary
PlatformServices autoload contract for Steam-priority platform APIs, achievements, rich presence, overlay, lobbies, and future provider adapters
update_triggers: lobby or platform multiplayer boundary changes

documents.authority: RNG autoload contract for deterministic named streams and run seed handling
GameState autoload contract for global flow states, transition signals, and pause linkage
GameClock autoload contract for gameplay time, ticks, scaled delta, and pause freezing
Settings autoload contract for registered setting defaults, runtime values, and change broadcasts
Analytics autoload contract for registered local telemetry events, privacy setting linkage, and buffered diagnostics
Replay autoload contract for deterministic input and decision recording, replay file persistence, summary diff, and gameplay input recording
Localization autoload contract for current locale, supported locales, Settings linkage, and translation lookup
PoolManager autoload contract for registered object pools, acquire/release lifecycle, prewarm boundaries, and runtime pool diagnostics
SaveManager autoload contract for meta/run/replay_index saves, standard envelopes, migrations, atomic writes, backup fallback, and broken-save quarantine
update_triggers: atomic write or broken-save behavior changes

documents.authority: MetaProgressionSystem autoload contract for F6 meta profile, settlement rewards, title upgrade panel, upgrade purchases, unlocks, and permanent modifiers
AudioManager autoload contract for SFX/voice/music registration, play_sfx/play_music entrypoints, Bus routing, and volume setting synchronization
UIManager autoload contract for UI scene stack, CanvasLayer root, and pause UI linkage
